rulings.Case Title: 250 KEARNY STREET, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. BRIDGETTA MAHLAR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, July 1, 2015, line 6. PLAINTIFF 250 KEARNY STREET, LLC's Motion For Attorneys Fees GRANTED in the amount of $5,990. Plaintiff is the prevailing party in the motion to enforce relocation agreement. Relocation Agreement provides for recovery of attorneys fees. To the extent Defendant is seeking the determination of the amount of damages caused by Defendant's failure to comply with Relocation Agreement, the request is denied as it is not properly before the Court. = (501/REQ)
